LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINANT SIM & YOON CORPORATION MOTION TO AMEND CROSS COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS DENIED. MOTION IS UNTIMELY AND DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1324. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION DOES NOT EXPLAIN WHAT RECENTLY OCCURRED TO WARRANT A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PERSONAL LIABILITY, OR WHY THIS MOTION WAS NOT BROUGHT EARLIER. IF THE SETTLEMENT TRANSCRIPT IS ERRONEOUS, IT IS UNCLEAR WHY COUNSEL DID NOT RAISE THAT ISSUE AT THE PRIOR HEARING. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
POS BY MAIL FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT RMHNS,INC.
DECLARATION OF IAN FRASER-THOMSON IN SUPPORT OF ROSSE DEFT RMHNS, INC.'S OPPOS TO X-COMPLAINT'S MOTION TO AMEND X-COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT RMHNS,INC.
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO FILE AMENDED X-COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SIM & YOON CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINANT SIM & YOON CORPORATION'S MOTION TO AMEND CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 1008(B) THAT REQUIRES AN AFFIDAVIT OF WHAT NEW OR DIFFERENT FACTS, CIRCUMSTANCES, OR LAW ARE CLAIMED TO BE SHOWN. CROSS-COMPLAINANT FAILS TO EXPLAIN WHY THE MOTION TO AMEND IS BEING MADE NOW, INSTEAD OF IN JANUARY 2009 WHEN THE MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT WAS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR 5797

MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANT SIM & YOON CORPORATION Motion to Amend Cross-Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Cross-complainant fails to comply with CCP section 1008(b) that requires an affidavit of what new or different facts, circumstances, or law are claimed to be shown. Cross-complainant fails to explain why the motion to amend is being made now, instead of in January 2009 when the motion to enforce settlement was denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Aof Motion And Motion To Amend Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANT SIM & YOON CORPORATION Motion to Amend Cross Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Motion is untimely and does not comply with CRC 3.1324. Counsel's declaration does not explain what recently occurred to warrant a cause of action for personal liability, or why this motion was not brought earlier. If the settlement transcript is erroneous, it is unclear why counsel did not raise that issue at the prior hearing. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
